name: cached-subagent-harness
description: Token-aware subagent batching, safe model routing, bounded session reuse, lifecycle state, and results visualization for agentic CLIs.

interface.longDescription: Adds a standalone cached-subagent-harness Skill and compact Rust harnessctl runtime for compatible-task batching, quality-constrained model routing, bounded Session reuse, stable prompts, SQLite lifecycle state, a bilingual results Dashboard, review/fix loops, and final audits.
defaultPrompt: Use cached-subagent-harness for this long-running refactor.
Coordinate subagents with batch-first routing, bounded Sessions, stable prompts, and a durable ledger.
Audit open subagents before finishing this task.
